title: MFGDMDataEventHandler Object
description: The MFGDMDataEventHandler is a client implemented class that can be added as a handler to a MFGDMDataEvent.

methods.name: notify
methods.description: The function called by Fusion when the associated event is fired.

related_samples.name: Gets all properties using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Fetches bulk component properties of the root component and from occurrences via single GraphQL query.

related_samples.name: Get part number using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Fetches part number of root component and from occurrences via GQL query.

related_samples.name: Set part number using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Sets part number of root component and from occurrences via GQL query.

notify.title: MFGDMDataEventHandler.notify Method
notify.description: The function called by Fusion when the associated event is fired.

parameters.name: eventArgs
parameters.description: Returns an object that provides access to additional information associated with the event.
